name: STAR GROUP, L.P.
business: Star Group is a home heating oil and propane distributor and service provider, selling home heating oil, propane, gasoline, diesel fuel, and providing heating and air conditioning installation and repair services primarily to residential and commercial customers in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic U.S. regions.
namedSuppliers: Shell Trading and Shell Oil Products US

exposures.sentence: We are a home heating oil and propane distributor and service provider to residential and commercial customers whose primary use is to heat their homes and buildings in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic U.S. regions.

We are committed to pursuing initiatives that reduce greenhouse gas emissions across our product offerings, by selling biodiesel products and by offering energy efficient heating and air conditioning equipment to our customers.

We are committed to pursuing initiatives that reduce greenhouse gas emissions across our product offerings, by selling biodiesel products and by offering energy efficient heating and air conditioning equipment to our customers.
In addition, we also repair and install natural gas and heat pump systems.

We install, maintain, and repair heating and air conditioning equipment and to a lesser extent provide these services outside of our heating oil and propane customer base including 20,200 service contracts for natural gas and other heating systems.
These offerings include, but are not limited to, the sales, service and installation of heating and air conditioning equipment, and standby home generators.
In addition, there are legislative and regulatory efforts underway in several states and certain municipalities seeking to reduce GHG emissions from fuel-burning systems.
Based on our records, our customer conversions to natural gas and electricity have ranged between 1.1% and 1.6% per year over the last five years.
new technology, including alternative methods for heating and cooling residences

tamClaims.claim: We believe we are the largest retail distributor of home heating oil in the United States, based upon sales volume with a market share in excess of 5.5%.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe we are the largest retail distributor of home heating oil in the United States, based upon sales volume with a market share in excess of 5.5%.

tamClaims.claim: According to the U.S. Department of Energy Energy Information Administration, Residential Energy Consumption Survey (released May 2022), these regions account for 82% (4.1 million of 5.0 million) of the households in the United States where heating oil is the main space-heating fuel and 19% (4.1 million of 21.9 million) of the homes in these regions use home heating oil as their main space-heating fuel.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the U.S. Department of Energy Energy Information Administration, Residential Energy Consumption Survey (released May 2022), these regions account for 82% (4.1 million of 5.0 million) of the households in the United States where heating oil is the main space-heating fuel and 19% (4.1 million of 21.9 million) of the homes in these regions use home heating oil as their main space-heating fuel.
